eas_text: A civil authority has issued A MISSING AND ENDANGERED PERSON ALERT for the following counties or areas: Lauderdale, MS; at 8:25 PM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 9:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Missing 10-year-old male child wearing black pants and blue shirt Go out look in your yard and outbuildings, look at cameras if available, if found call 911 and advise
